Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-29 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong momentum performers at the top of the rankings. MAMA claims the #1 position with a composite score of 95.2, driven by outstanding consistency across timeframes—it's up 154.62% over one year with particularly strong near-term gains (42.41% in one month), and it passes all four SMA gates with perfect scores on ratio consistency (98.05) and resilience during SPY downturns (97.57). SPHR follows closely with even more extreme year-to-date returns at 312.79%, though its score appears cut off in the data; it demonstrates exceptional ratio progression (all 5 ratio passes) and a notably low bad_spy_score of 0.9381, indicating it holds up better than most when the broader market weakens. Both stocks show high volatility ratios (MAMA at 1.936) and clean momentum signals, suggesting their gains reflect genuine directional strength rather than noise. The key distinction is MAMA's superior intra-timeframe consistency versus SPHR's more explosive absolute returns, indicating different risk-reward profiles within the highest-ranked momentum cohort.
